body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
We recently ran into some compat entry issues - see #322
The downgrade test should catch this in the future.

This PR also changes the tolerance in the saturation adjustment test. Previously it was set to `1e-10`, independent of the float type. This failed in the downgrade test on Float32, probably because of some precision differences in RootSolvers 0.4.x vs 1.0.x. Since the tolerance should really depend on the float type, I changed it to `sqrt(eps(FT))`.
title: add downgrade test
